mergeRationale: The patch keeps the matrix shape but replaces the nested right-hand separability matrix with all ones, losing independence information.

requiredFindings.summary: The patch replaces the nested right-side separability matrix with all ones.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: It preserves shape but loses independence information, so nested models report false dependencies.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Copy the existing right matrix into the right block instead of filling it with 1.

requiredFindings.summary: The test checks only matrix shape.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: A wrong all-ones block has the same shape as the correct matrix.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Assert exact boolean matrix values for nested left and right CompoundModels.

disallowedConclusions: The patch can be merged because the nested test checks the matrix shape.
Using all ones is safe because a nested model's outputs depend on every nested input.
